description: Soft auth gate on deck reward claim: anonymous users see popup with 'Sign in to claim' CTA + pending claim localStorage queue. On sign-in, setActiveDeck + markDeckRewardSeen called from auth callback. getCurrentUserSync() exported from auth.js. i18n keys added to common.js.
notes: loginWithProvider hardcoded to google — Apple path deferred. setActiveDeck import into auth.js: no circular dep verified.
